subcodes.first_line: O servant! Hearken unto My call, for through My call are the hearts of all the world quickened. Remember thy Lord in the watches of the night [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد اسمع ندائی و ان بندائی تحیی افئده العالمین ان اذکر ربک فی اللیالی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @proclamation to the people of the world, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @love of God, @Word of God the cause of creation, @service to others; to the Cause of God
